description: Text recognition from images using Tesseract OCR engine

ocr_text_from_image.name: OCR Text From Image
ocr_text_from_image.description: Recognize text from an image file

ocr_text_from_screen.name: OCR Text From Screen
ocr_text_from_screen.description: Recognize text from the screen or a screen region

find_text_on_screen.name: Find Text On Screen
find_text_on_screen.description: Find text coordinates on screen and return center point

click_text.name: Click Text
click_text.description: Find text on screen and click at its coordinates

get_text_coordinates.name: Get Text Coordinates
get_text_coordinates.description: Get the bounding box coordinates of text on screen

set_ocr_language.name: Set OCR Language
set_ocr_language.description: Set the OCR language for subsequent operations

set_ocr_confidence.name: Set OCR Confidence
set_ocr_confidence.description: Set the minimum confidence threshold for text detection

get_ocr_data.name: Get OCR Data
get_ocr_data.description: Get detailed OCR data including text, coordinates, and confidence scores

ocr_multi_language.name: OCR Multi Language
ocr_multi_language.description: Run OCR with multiple Tesseract language packs

ocr_with_confidence.name: OCR With Confidence
ocr_with_confidence.description: Run OCR and return each word with its confidence score

compare_images.name: Compare Images
compare_images.description: Compare two images and return a similarity score

read_barcode.name: Read Barcode
read_barcode.description: Decode barcodes and QR codes from an image
